case_title: TIM PAK WONG VS. PHILLIP WU

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, TIM PAK AS TO DEFENDANT WU, PHILLIP AN INDIVIDUAL DBA GOLDEN ART CONSTRUCTION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, TIM PAK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WU, PHILLIP AN INDIVIDUAL DBA GOLDEN ART CONSTRUCTION $5,406.11 PRINCIPAL, $148.66 INTEREST, $153.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,708.07, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
